did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a systematic literature review (SLR) that analyzes existing research on the use of AI and digital imaging in infantile hemangioma. It does not employ AI, machine learning, or deep learning methods to generate new study results or perform diagnostic tasks itself; rather, it synthesizes findings from 21 previously published articles.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
